title: Fizzle Flip Flop
poem_text:
Fizzle flip the snickety snaps,
Bumble bump the zippy zaps.
Wiggle woo the jitter jig,
Dibble dab the frisky fig.
Tumble tum the licky loo,
Giggle gush the wobbly woo.
Pitter pat the tickle tap,
Dozing now—just shut the flap.
cover_context: A glowing, swirling night sky filled with playful, bouncing blobs of light and color, like fireflies dancing in a dream.
style_prompt: Children's musical poem, piano and light brush drums, 117 BPM, bouncy and playful, fun energy that channels into rhythm, clear warm vocal, every word easy to understand
